title: Fix stale handle_params on filter change
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/jobs_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.JobsLive) where the filter is URL-driven. The filter buttons use <.link patch={~p"/jobs?status=#{status}"}>. handle_params/3 reads params["status"] (default "all") and reloads the stream with reset: true. Must NOT reload in mount. mount/3 only sets the empty stream + default assigns. Do not use push_patch inside handle_event — the patch links handle it.
tier_rationale: URL-patch-driven filter reload with proper separation of mount vs handle_params.
